form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up second last of 8 at this track Cl3-Sw on March 21 over 1000m, 10 len behind Bourbon Lane with 62kg at $17. Last start second last of 9 at Barcaldine Cl4 on April 4 over 1300m, 7 len behind Ferghana carrying 56kg at $21. Needs to improve on recent form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Laid in under pressure in the home straight.
Bumped and taken wider shortly after jumping when Bold Smuggler shifted wider.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 2nd in a small field at Mt Isa Cl3-Sw on April 3 over 1100m, 4 len behind Heavenly Legend carrying 60kg at $8.50. The race before that won by 0.6 len at Cloncurry Bm50 March 28 over 1200m defeating Threefold carrying 62kg at $5.50. Tricky gate but racing well and should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up 3rd of 7 at Barcaldine Cl4-Sw on March 7 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2 len behind She Smashes with 60.5kg at $2.20. Second-up 3rd in a small field at Emerald Bm65 on April 4 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Outback Step with 58.5kg at $3.10. Rates highly. Has a great third-up record and expected to go close.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 58-day let-up. At the latest run 11th of 13 at Randwick Highway-C3 on February 14 over 1800m, 5 len behind Warrior For Peace carrying 58kg at $31. The run before that got back early 13th of 17 at Rosehill H'way-C3sw on January 31 over 1500m, 5 len behind Navy Steel carrying 59kg at $101. Former Sydney galloper who makes plenty of appeal in the new surrounds.
